top_signals.title: EU trade relations with developing countries continue to create sustainable economic growth
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission and the High Representative for the Common Foreign and Security Policy published a new joint report on the implementation of the Generalised Scheme of Preferences (GSP) – the EU's main trade policy tool to support developing countries' exports to the bloc.
